# Purchase and Delivery

At Acme Shop, purchasing gift cards is designed to be easy and convenient for customers. Digital gift cards can be bought from the Gift Cards page, with delivery typically occurring within an hour, although it may take up to 24 hours during peak times. In contrast, physical gift cards, which are available only in the continental United States, require the recipient's postal address for dispatch and usually arrive within 5-7 business days, with expedited options available. Both types of gift cards can be redeemed online and in-store, enhancing the recipient's shopping flexibility.

[Source: gift_cards.md#purchase-and-delivery]
